overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character riding a horse through a snowy, mountainous landscape. The rider navigates through boulder fields and narrow rocky gorges in a winter environment with overcast skies and falling snow.

events.description: navigating between large snow-covered boulders on the trail
turning slightly right to follow the winding path

agents.ego_description: riding a horse through a field of large boulders, navigating the snowy mountain trail at a steady pace

entered.detail: massive snow-covered boulder dominating the right side of the trail
large snow-dusted rock formation on the left side
steep mountain slope covered in deep snow with scattered trees
cluster of evergreen pine trees on the mountainside

segments.scene_description: The rider on horseback navigates through a snowy mountain pass filled with large boulders. The trail winds between snow-covered rocks and scattered pine trees on the slopes under an overcast, snowy sky.

events.description: entering a narrow gorge with steep rock walls rising on both sides
continuing through the winding rocky passage with cliffs on either side

agents.ego_description: riding through a narrow rocky gorge, flanked by steep snow-dusted cliff walls

entered.detail: steep vertical rock wall forming the left side of the narrow gorge
tall cliff face on the right side of the passage

segments.scene_description: The trail enters a narrow rocky gorge with steep cliff walls rising on both sides. The rider continues through the confined snow-covered passage as the large boulders of the previous area fall behind, with pine trees now visible on the right slope.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain trail with sparse snow

events.description: ground surface transitions from deep snow to exposed rocky terrain
navigating around scattered rocks on the increasingly rugged trail

agents.ego_description: riding through increasingly rocky terrain as the snow cover thins, following the mountain trail through misty conditions

entered.detail: exposed gray rock formation with minimal snow coverage
field of smaller rocks and stones covering the trail ahead

segments.scene_description: The gorge opens up into a wider rocky area where deep snow gives way to exposed stone and gravel. The rider continues along the trail through the sparse, misty mountain landscape, navigating around scattered rocks as the terrain becomes more rugged.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy mountain pass that gradually narrows into a gorge before opening into a rugged, rocky expanse. It begins with the rider navigating a winding trail between large snow-covered boulders and scattered pine trees under an overcast sky. As the path progresses, the landscape shifts into a confined rocky gorge with steep cliff walls rising on both sides, leaving the open boulder fields behind. The scene then expands as the gorge opens into a wider area where the deep snow gives way to exposed stone and gravel. Finally, the camera follows the rider through a sparse, misty mountain landscape, navigating around scattered rocks across increasingly rugged terrain.
